title: Lodestone Warps
description:
Sneaking on a lodestone with a compass teleports you to the connected lodestone.
Works cross-dimensional.
body:
Ever felt that Lodestones were kind of useless?

Sneaking on a lodestone with a lodestone compass in your offhand and switching it to your mainhand now teleports you on-top of the connected lodestone and destroys the held compass.

Place a lodestone compass in a crafting grid with a regular compass to copy the location.

Works cross-dimensional

No tick functions
